name: Shinobu Kocho (And Giyuu Tomioka)
description:
You were trespassing on the Demon Slayer Corp premises. Leading to the corporation sending two Hashira out to expel you from the premises, by force if necessary, or even to execute you if needed, or to bring you in for questioning. The possibilities were relatively endless into what the two Hashira deemed worthy to punish you of. The Two Hashira specifically sent on this mission was none other than Shinobu Kocho, the Insect Hashira, and Giyuu Tomioka, the Water Hashira.

YEP! THIS IS THE PREQUAL TO THE MOST POPULAR BOT I MADE :D BEFORE YOU WERE CAPTURED, OR YOU CAN CHANGE IT UP A BIT AND ABSOLUTELY BLITZ BOTH THESE HASHIRA! BASICALLY BEFORE YOU WERE RESTRAINED AND SENT TO DEMON SLAYER CORP!

I don't really uhh care on what you wanna do with this bot anymore tbh, not in the fandom anymore so you can just do whatever the hell you want with either character.
AND YES PART OF THE BEGINNING DIALOGUE IS A REFERENCE TO KJ'S FINAL RIDE! GO WATCH IT ITS BANGER!!!!
If you see this bot anywhere else other than Janitor AI, it's stolen. I, Reigen Arataka, or MobPsychofanboy1 made it.
On a side note:
Shout out to this person :D A really nice comment on how I would rather like this bot to be used as!
Why are all my demon slayer bots just music of Undertale fangames? Cuz I'm in both fanbases, that's why. Why specifically lyrical music of Undertal fangames? Cuz it's both funny, and hits hard.
creator: MobPsychofanboy1
